definition.config: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="config_start" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><next><block type="config_category"><field name="name">game</field><statement name="write"><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">ban</field><field name="comment">是否封禁玩家 Whether to ban the player</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">ban</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">crash</field><field name="comment">是否崩溃 Whether it has crashed</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">crash</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">always_online</field><field name="comment">是否将你视为拥有正版账号的玩家，即使你是离线账号玩家 Whether to consider you as an Online player, even if you are an Offline player</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">always_online</field><field name="value">false</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="config_category"><field name="name">event</field><statement name="write"><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">event_interval</field><field name="comment">事件发生的间隔 The interval at the time of the event</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">event_interval</field><field name="value">10000</field></block></value></block></statement><next><block type="config_category"><field name="name">entity</field><statement name="write"><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">undefined_damagecap</field><field name="comment">Undefined Boss的限伤 The maximum damage the Undefined Boss can receive</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">undefined_damagecap</field><field name="value">10000</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">missing_damagecap</field><field name="comment">穿戴Missing盔甲的玩家最大可以受到的伤害 The maximum damage that a player wearing missing armor can receive</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">missing_damagecap</field><field name="value">10000</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">spawn_entity</field><field name="comment">是否允许实体生成 Is entity spawn allowed</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">spawn_entity</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">replace_to_glowing_obsidian</field><field name="comment">是否允许实体替换水为发光的黑曜石 Is entity replace water to glowing obsidian allowed</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">replace_to_glowing_obsidian</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">breakblock</field><field name="comment">是否允许实体破坏方块 Whether entities are allowed to destroy blocks</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">breakblock</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="config_category"><field name="name">misc</field><statement name="write"><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">watchdog_crashtime</field><field name="comment">Watchdog过去多少tick后会崩溃 After how many ticks will the watchdog crash</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">watchdog_crashtime</field><field name="value">1200</field></block></value></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
